targets.boundary: Absolute, combined scope 1, scope 2 (market-based), and scope 3 emissions within Alphabet’s ambition-based boundary.
targets.notes: SBTi validated Alphabet’s near-term science-based emissions reduction ambition in February 2025 and in 2025 the boundary was adjusted to exclude certain peripheral scope 3 activities.
targets.title: Carbon reduction moonshot 50% absolute reduction by 2030

targets.boundary: Net-zero across all operations and value chain, with absolute combined scope 1, scope 2 (market-based), and scope 3 emissions reduced by 50% from a 2019 base year and remaining emissions neutralized with carbon removal.
targets.notes: Described as an ambition to reach net-zero emissions across the value chain by 2030 with planned investments in carbon removal solutions.
targets.title: Net-zero emissions across operations and value chain by 2030
